title: hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. valdepilosum
intro: Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. valdepilosum, also known as Pyrenean hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium pyrenaicum plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. valdepilosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various conditions such as eczema, acne, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. valdepilosum often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
